targets.queryText: WITH latest_portfolio AS (SELECT * FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1), prev_portfolio AS (SELECT * FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT as_of_date_local FROM latest_portfolio) ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1), latest_holdings AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings)), prev_holdings AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings))) SELECT 'Market Value' AS "Metric", ROUND(lp.market_value, 0) AS "Today", ROUND(COALESCE(pp.market_value, 0), 0) AS "Yesterday", ROUND(lp.market_value - COALESCE(pp.market_value, 0), 0) AS "Delta" FROM latest_portfolio lp LEFT JOIN prev_portfolio pp UNION ALL SELECT 'Net Liquidation', ROUND(lp.net_liquidation_value, 0), ROUND(COALESCE(pp.net_liquidation_value, 0), 0), ROUND(lp.net_liquidation_value - COALESCE(pp.net_liquidation_value, 0), 0) FROM latest_portfolio lp LEFT JOIN prev_portfolio pp UNION ALL SELECT 'Monthly Income', ROUND(lp.projected_monthly_income, 2), ROUND(COALESCE(pp.projected_monthly_income, 0), 2), ROUND(lp.projected_monthly_income - COALESCE(pp.projected_monthly_income, 0), 2) FROM latest_portfolio lp LEFT JOIN prev_portfolio pp UNION ALL SELECT 'LTV %', ROUND(lp.ltv_pct, 1), ROUND(COALESCE(pp.ltv_pct, 0), 1), ROUND(lp.ltv_pct - COALESCE(pp.ltv_pct, 0), 1) FROM latest_portfolio lp LEFT JOIN prev_portfolio pp UNION ALL SELECT 'Holdings Count', lh.cnt AS "Today", COALESCE(ph.cnt, 0) AS "Yesterday", lh.cnt - COALESCE(ph.cnt, 0) AS "Delta" FROM latest_holdings lh LEFT JOIN prev_holdings ph;

SELECT h1.symbol AS "Symbol", ROUND(h1.weight_pct, 2) AS "Today Weight %", ROUND(h2.weight_pct, 2) AS "Prev Weight %", ROUND(h1.weight_pct - h2.weight_pct, 2) AS "Weight Delta %", ROUND(h1.market_value, 0) AS "Today MV", ROUND(h2.market_value, 0) AS "Prev MV", ROUND(h1.market_value - h2.market_value, 0) AS "MV Delta" FROM daily_holdings h1 LEFT JOIN daily_holdings h2 ON h1.symbol = h2.symbol AND h2.as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local < (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings)) WHERE h1.as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND h2.symbol IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ABS(h1.weight_pct - h2.weight_pct) DESC LIMIT 10;
